title: tragacantha pycnocephala
intro: Tragacantha pycnocephala, also known as Hairy Broom or Hairy Broom Ra, is a plant species in the genus Astragalus. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Tragacantha pycnocephala is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits.
